channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan

📄 Summary: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month....

item.title: [2] [大V/权威] Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
item.description:
📊 Score: 170 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release

📄 Summary: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are real cybersecurity concerns a cover for a bigger problem at the frontier lab?...

item.title: [5] [模型算法] SL-FAC: A Communication-Efficient Split Learning Framework with Frequency-Aware Compression
item.description:
📊 Score: 121 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • edge_optimization
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: The growing complexity of neural networks hinders the deployment of distributed machine learning on resource-constrained devices. Split learning (SL) offers a promising solution by partitioning the large model and offloading the primary training workload from edge devices to an edge server. However, the increasing number of participating devices an...

item.title: [6] [模型算法] Joint Optimization of Reasoning and Dual-Memory for Self-Learning Diagnostic Agent
item.description:
📊 Score: 121 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • edge_optimization
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Clinical expertise improves not only by acquiring medical knowledge, but by accumulating experience that yields reusable diagnostic patterns. Recent LLMs-based diagnostic agents have shown promising progress in clinical reasoning for decision support. However, most approaches treat cases independently, limiting experience reuse and continual adapta...

item.title: [7] [模型算法] OpenSpatial: A Principled Data Engine for Empowering Spatial Intelligence
item.description:
📊 Score: 117 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Spatial understanding is a fundamental cornerstone of human-level intelligence. Nonetheless, current research predominantly focuses on domain-specific data production, leaving a critical void: the absence of a principled, open-source engine capable of fully unleashing the potential of high-quality spatial data. To bridge this gap, we elucidate the ...
